title: A Decisive Matchup in the Onigashima Raid
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16, Luffy as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Arabesque Brick Fist!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Shing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Shave!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Tempt Kick!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: "Iron body," right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those are the six powers used by government officials!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I remember hearing about a rogue member of CPs, the secret intelligence agency,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Breaking out of prison! The idea of an official being arrested struck me as odd.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hahaha!! I can't believe you know such an old story!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, it's true!! Back then, we never made direct contact, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm pretty happy with how things turned out,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I used to have it rough due to a mistake I made 12 years ago.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I used to be considered a bright prospect. A rival to the genius, Rob LUCC!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Fang pistol!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can see your talent, you use variants on the six powers I've never seen before..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your situation sounds unfortunate, but it doesn't seem to have anything to do with me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On the contrary!! You just said it your- self...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're a proud member of the straw hat crew!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that name always reminds me of my bitter past...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 12 years ago, I failed to guard a devil fruit that was being transported on a government ship...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was shocked when "STRAW HAT" Luffy came to prominence two years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: That's when I learned...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...that the stolen gomu gomu fruit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: ...had been eaten by him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A fruit is important enough for the world' govern-ment to guard?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 25 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
